productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Blue Printed Top
description: Style Note This blue and black top with a pretty tie up, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this cute top. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Product Details Blue and black top that has a one sided sleeve on the right, sleeveless on the left with a tie-up, pin tucks on the right and a broad band at the hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Line dry Warm iron on reverse do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8& rdquo and chest 33& rdquo ) is wearing a size M
